code: import React from"react";import API from"../api";import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function AddToCartButton(_ref){let{productId}=_ref;const addToCart=async()=>{try{await API.post("/cart",{productId,quantity:1});alert("Item added to cart!");window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent("cartUpdated"));}catch(error){console.error("Add to cart failed",error);alert("Failed to add item to cart");}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:addToCart,className:"add-cart-btn",children:"Add to Cart"});}
